title: Deterministic inventory rule failure cascades through gateway chain
root_cause: ServiceB throws InvalidOperationException based on deterministic hash branch, and upstream services currently convert it to generic 500 responses.
impact: Order processing requests fail end-to-end for specific requestId patterns, creating recurring user-visible 500 errors and noisy retries.
fix: Replace exception-based deterministic branch in ServiceB with an explicit business validation response and map upstream handling to clear 4xx semantics where applicable.
